operatorReportedClearances.note: Operator reported audit and legal requirements cleared.

daily: Run or review mainnet monitor status.
Confirm alerts do not require response.
weekly: Review restricted-mode final release and handoff gates.
monthly: Confirm no capability was activated without action-specific approval.
quarterly: Review Safe ownership and governance authority references.
Review disclosure and legal/audit evidence references.
eventDriven: After any material status change, run public refresh.
After any material status change, run evidence archive.
After any incident, update incident summary and archive evidence.
Before any capability activation, start a separate action-specific approval path.

hardRule: This maintenance schedule documents recurring restricted-mode operations only. It does not approve launch, funding, public sale, staking, rewards, buybacks, execution, automation, autonomous execution, Safe payload generation, or Safe transaction execution.
